text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun managed to pull off an
incredible victory, but she seems sort of down.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I did it. Go ahead, shower me with praise.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Aah... I love it when you praise me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her spirits seem to have picked back up a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But who cares about that?! Go ahead and praise
me! Say I did a good job!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I won't take a single step until my tanks are
topped up with your love!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to be pouting, so I go ahead and
comfort her for a while.
